log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kalashtar — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Kalashtar — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===

--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Kalashtar — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:2+6=8 vs AC 15] MISS.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
